headline: Assessing Nordson (NDSN) Valuation After Recent Share Price Momentum And Mixed Multiple Signals
summary: Nordson stock reaction and recent performance Nordson (NDSN) has drawn investor attention after a recent move in its share price, with the stock slipping around 0.5% over the past day but still showing gains over the past month and past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Nordson. Nordson's latest share price of $282.36 comes after a small 1 day share price decline, but the stock still carries a 30 day share price return of 8.5% and a 1 year total shareholder return of 52.1%.
